buffet.def: 自助餐、碗碟櫥、連續打擊、打擊的人、打擊地 (自助餐)
buffet.col: all-you-can-eat buffet, buffet lunch, buffeted by waves
buffet.ex: The luxury hotel offers a grand seafood buffet tonight.

buffoon.def: 小丑、滑稽的人、滑稽的人物、滑稽地 (丑)
buffoon.ex: Don't act like a clumsy buffoon in front of the guests.

buffoonery.ex: The movie is full of slapstick buffoonery.

bug.def: 甲蟲、(俚)竊聽器、程式錯誤、安裝竊聽器、煩擾、竊聽的人、煩擾地 (蟲)
bug.col: computer bug, litter bug, bugs bunny, bug me (煩我)
bug.ex: The technician found a minor bug in the software code.

bugaboo.def: 恐怖的東西、嚇人的幻影 (單數)
bugaboo.ex: The fear of snakes is a common bugaboo for many people.

bugbear.def: 令人恐懼的事、討厭的事、幻影的人、討厭地 (厭)
bugbear.ex: Grammar is a major bugbear for some English learners.

buggery.ex: In the past, buggery was considered a serious crime.

buggy.def: 輕型馬車、(嬰兒)推車、多蟲的、像蟲般的人、有蟲地 (車)
buggy.col: beach buggy, baby buggy, dune buggy
buggy.ex: We rented a beach buggy to drive along the coast.

bugle.def: 軍號、喇叭、吹號、大聲叫喊的小人物、吹號地 (號)
bugle.ex: The bugle sounded the call to wake up the soldiers.

bugler.ex: The military bugler played at the funeral ceremony.

build.def: 建造、建築、建立、體格、建造的人 (或物)、建造地 (造)
build.col: build up (增強), build a reputation, athletic build
build.ex: The company chose to build its first factory in the north.

builder.ex: The property builder plans to finish the project by next year.

building.def: 建築物、大樓、建造的人 (或物) (建)
building.col: apartment building, office building, historic building
building.ex: That old apartment building is scheduled for renovation.

build-up/buildup.def: 增強、積聚、吹捧、增強的人 (或物)、積聚地 (增)
build-up/buildup.ex: The military build-up on the border concerned the UN.

built.def: (build的過去式及過去分詞)、體格為...的
built.ex: The ancient Romans built roads that are still used today.

built-in.ex: The new laptop has many useful built-in features.

bulb.def: 球莖、球狀物、電燈泡、膨脹的人物、球狀地 (球)
bulb.col: light bulb, flower bulb, onion bulb
bulb.ex: Wait until the light bulb cools down before changing it.

bulbous.ex: The strange fruit had a heavy, bulbous shape.

bulge.def: 膨脹、凸起、激增、凸起的人 (或物)、凸起地 (凸)
bulge.ex: The shopping bags were starting to bulge with gifts.

bulging.def: 凸出的、膨脹的的人 (或物) (凸)
bulging.ex: He looked at the money with widening, bulging eyes.

bulimic.ex: He has struggled with bulimic eating habits for years.

bulk.def: 體積、大半、散裝、顯得巨大、大半的人、散裝地 (大)
bulk.col: in bulk (大量), bulk carrier, bulk of (大半)
bulk.ex: We prefer to buy our basic cleaning supplies in bulk.

bulkhead.ex: The ship's watertight bulkhead prevented the spreading of the leak.
